jdk.dynalink.support/ChainedCallSite/rel.name: relink
signatures: public void relink(GuardedInvocation guardedInvocation, MethodHandle relinkAndInvoke)

description.en: This method will be called by the dynamic linker every time the call site is relinked (but seeRelinkableCallSite.resetAndRelink(GuardedInvocation, MethodHandle)for an exception).

excerpt.es: This method will be called by the dynamic linker every time the call site is relinked (but seeRelinkableCallSite.resetAndRelink(GuardedInvocation, MethodHandle)for an exception).
excerpt.en: This method will be called by the dynamic linker every time the call site is relinked (but seeRelinkableCallSite.resetAndRelink(GuardedInvocation, MethodHandle)for an exception).

jdk.dynalink.support/ChainedCallSite/res.name: resetAndRelink
signatures: public void resetAndRelink(GuardedInvocation guardedInvocation, MethodHandle relinkAndInvoke)

description.en: This method will be called by the dynamic linker every time the call site is relinkedandthe linker wishes the call site to throw away any prior linkage state (that is how it differs fromRelinkableCallSite.relink(GuardedInvocation, MethodHandle)).
